blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,382 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 25°F.
